content: These criteria never improved across 3 iterations and scored <70% — may be unmeasurable or need clearer measurements: question_precision_scope, predicate_device_analysis, clinical_validation_rigor, software_documentation_risk_alignment, iec_62304_compliance_integration, meeting_timing_strategic_positioning, bias_analysis_monitoring_strategy
task: Draft an FDA 510(k) presubmission meeting request for a Class II AI-powered radiology diagnostic device, including predicate device comparison, clinical validation strategy, and software documentation plan.
